bng-condition-exemption-reasons.reason: Development subject to the de minimis exemption (development below the threshold)
bng-condition-exemption-reasons.details: The applicant states the works are internal-only development to an existing building, with no demolition, new build, excavation, landscaping, external development, land take or habitat loss. The property retains C3 dwellinghouse use and the proposal includes listed building consent.
